Metadata.title: ARBC — The Shift Makers
Metadata.description: Strategy, design, video and digital development agency.

Home.b1_p1: ARBC AGENCY accompanies organizations that refuse the status quo.
Home.b2_main: move the lines of your market
Home.b3_sub: that propels your organization to new heights.

conseil.title:
Marketing &
Communication Consulting
body: Analyse the market, spot trends, understand the real business challenges, and turn it all into an action plan tailored to your ambitions and resources.

No pointless talk or off-the-shelf strategy. Here, we dig, question, deconstruct… then rebuild. We guide you where it matters: where your products and solutions will translate into results. Because what matters today is knowing what to do, why, and how to do it better than anyone else.

gestion.title:
Project
Management
body: We never run short of ideas — but what makes all the difference is the art of executing them. And that's the playground of our project managers.

Plan, control, direct, adjust. Our teams pilot every mission with precision and a global vision. We manage deadlines, resources and the unexpected without losing sight of the final goal: delivering something concrete, quality-driven and fully controlled.

digital.title:
Digital
Marketing
body: At ARBC, digital is a powerful lever to connect, engage and amplify brands across the continent. In a hyper-connected Africa, where social networks have become spaces for exchange, culture and influence, we craft strategies that speak truth.

Our mission: capture attention, spark conversations and build communities around your brand. Social media, ad campaigns, engaging content, SEO, email marketing… We think strategy, speak human, act with impact.

street.title:
Street
Marketing
body: In Africa, the human connection is king. Streets live, pulse and bring people together. At ARBC, we place this social warmth at the heart of our field campaigns.

Because nothing replaces a handshake, a smile, a face-to-face exchange, our street marketing creates direct, authentic and memorable experiences. Sampling, animations, events, targeted operations: we turn every interaction into a powerful moment, every contact into a lasting connection.

graphic.title:
Graphic Design
2D & 3D
body: At ARBC, our creatives don't just follow trends — they redraw them, with boldness and a resolutely African signature.

Our visuals draw from the textures, colours, rhythms and symbols of the continent to create designs that vibrate with originality and authenticity. In 2D and 3D alike, every creation tells a story, embodies an identity, and leaves a mark. Whether for a brand, a product or a campaign, we fuse art and technique to bring your ideas to life with power and character.

video.title:
Video Production &
Advertising Spot
body: Today, video is queen — it sits at the heart of popular culture, bringing millions together, moving them and shaping influence across the continent.

At ARBC, we harness this power to create videos and advertising spots that capture attention from the very first second. From concept to final cut, through editing and sound design, we produce content for every screen: television, social media, digital platforms — to make your brand live where it truly matters.

uiux.title:
UI/UX
Design
body: Today, a great digital experience makes all the difference between an interface you leave and one you adopt. At ARBC, we place the human at the centre of every design decision.

We create intuitive, elegant and efficient interfaces that naturally guide users through every interaction. Wireframes, prototypes, user testing, design systems: we build experiences that work and that people love.

webdev.title:
Web & Mobile
Development
body: In a world of constant digital evolution, your online presence is your most powerful showcase. At ARBC, we design custom, robust and scalable websites and mobile applications.

From concept to launch, our developers master modern technologies to deliver high-performance, secure digital solutions tailored to your specific needs. Showcase sites, e-commerce, business applications or digital platforms: we build tools that work for you, around the clock.

s1.label: 01 — Brand Presentation
s1.title:
Presentation
De la marque
body: BETMOMO is a pan-African digital entertainment player, specialising in online sports betting.
Present across several African countries, the brand has established itself as a reference through a secure platform and a fluid user experience.
body2: BETMOMO offers its community total gaming flexibility through a complete digital ecosystem: a high-performance web portal and a mobile application optimised for iOS and Android.

s2.label: 02 — The Challenge
s2.title:
The Agency's
Challenge
body: Supporting the deployment of BETMOMO across the African market, with a focus on Côte d'Ivoire and Cameroon. The primary objective was to go beyond simple communication and anchor the brand as a lasting reference in the sports betting sector.

s3.label: 03 — Our Response
col1_body: Deployment of street marketing campaigns (in-store and street activations) to drive direct recruitment of new bettors and build grassroots brand awareness in popular neighbourhoods across Cameroon and Côte d'Ivoire.
col2_body: Supervision of the graphic pipeline and production of visuals and advertising spots (TV/Radio/Digital). The objective was to build a strong, memorable visual identity capable of adapting to local cultural codes while respecting BetMomo's brand image.
col3_body: Organisation of key brand moments (launch evenings, bettor tournaments, sponsorship events) aimed at building an active community around the brand and establishing trust with local partners.

s4.label: Results
r1_body: A significant increase in new users and app downloads.
r2_body: The broadcast of advertising spots generated an immediate impact, significantly increasing brand recognition among the betting community.
r3_body: Thousands of direct contacts established through brand ambassadors, fostering increased user loyalty.

s1.title:
Brand
Presentation
body: Specialised in functional medicine, Heart Choice supports patients in the fight against degenerative diseases.
Their expertise focuses particularly on the comprehensive management of complex conditions such as cancer, hepatitis, sickle cell disease and others.

s2.title:
The Agency's
Challenge
body: Build a strong and reassuring visual identity to establish Heart Choice's credibility with its audience.
At the same time, steer a brand awareness strategy aimed at expanding the brand's reach and acquiring new clients.

s3.title:
Our
Response
col1_points: Creation of a minimalist and distinctive logo, designed to embody Heart Choice's values of reliability and professionalism.
3D architecture of the offices, providing a commercial projection for partners and clients.
Design and deployment of an optimised showcase website focused on user experience.
col2_points: Social Media Strategy: Community activation and management on WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram and TikTok, with an editorial line focused on functional medicine education and patient testimonials.

s4.title: Results
s4.description: These figures summarise the overall performance across 3 networks, over the first 05 months of deployment. Performance indicators show continuous organic growth, driven by the ongoing strategic deployment.

s1.title:
Brand
Presentation
body: Le Lagon Club est un cercle privé d'exception conçu pour une communauté de visionnaires partageant des valeurs et des codes de haute exigence.

Véritable sanctuaire de l'influence, le club se distingue par une atmosphère ultra-sélective et une ambiance feutrée, offrant à ses membres un espace de convergence unique, loin de l'agitation conventionnelle. C'est le point de ralliement privilégié d'une élite en quête de rareté et de discrétion.

s2.title:
The Agency's
Challenge
body: Concevoir une identité visuelle et numérique capable de captiver une élite visionnaire tout en préservant le caractère confidentiel du club.

s3.title:
Our
Response
s3.p1_body: Creation of a minimalist and timeless graphic system, anchoring the brand within the codes of high distinction.
s3.p2_body: Development of an immersive platform conceived as a hidden door, blending mystery and high-end ergonomics.
s3.p3_body: Design of premium printed materials translating the excellence and rarity of the Lagon Club universe.

s4.title: Results
s4.r1_body: Editorial materials (brochures and catalogues) whose high production quality transformed every copy into a collector's item, reinforcing the sense of belonging to an exceptional circle and the brand's rarity.
s4.r2_body: A visual identity and brand charter so refined that they immediately established the club as the undisputed epicentre of influence, naturally attracting the most visionary personalities.

body: Jamalia Group est une entreprise agro-industrielle basée au Cameroun, créatrice de saveurs authentiques sous le label United Tastes of Africa.

Spécialisée dans les amuse-gueules premium (Caramelo, chipsmelo, peanuts, barres de sésame), l'entreprise transforme des matières premières locales (arachides, sésame, plantain) en produits d'exception destinés à une clientèle urbaine et exigeante, ainsi qu'au secteur du catering (compagnies aériennes, hôtels).
En partenariat avec l'agence Quantom, notre agence a été mandatée par le fonds d'investissement Investisseurs & Partenaires (I&P) pour piloter la stratégie marketing et communication de Jamalia.
Notre mission : concevoir et déployer un dispositif global visant à catalyser la croissance de l'entreprise et à structurer l'expansion de son réseau de distribution.

s4.title: Results
s4.r1_body: The success of the test deployment phase validated the alignment of the offer with consumer expectations.

s3.title:
Our
Response
s3.p1_body: Field immersion in Yaoundé, Douala and Pouyamba. Tasting sessions and surface research to map consumer preferences and habits.
s3.p2_body: Definition of a coherent strategic positioning, including targeting and optimisation of the 4Ps (Product, Price, Distribution, Promotion) with a strong focus on the client network.
s3.p3_body: Design of a targeted communication plan to support Jamalia's growth, through impactful messages and supports adapted to digital channels (social media, influencers) and offline.
s3.p4_body: Professionalisation of the sales force through a targeted training programme: sales techniques, product arguments and customer relationship management.
s3.p5_body: Structured point-of-sale presence: merchandising, commercial animations and development of the local distribution network.

body: Liji Sarl is a pioneering Cameroonian agro-industrial company dedicated to adding value to local resources for young children's nutrition.

Specializing in infant nutrition and healthy snacking, it designs and markets a range of fruit compotes for babies and children, made exclusively from fresh local fruits. The company also diversifies its offering with a line of cassava chips.
Today, Liji Sarl stands out on the shelves of supermarkets and grocery stores as a local, natural, and high-quality alternative to imported products.

s2.title: The Agency's Challenge
body: Create a strong visual identity and an impactful content strategy for LIJI's launch campaigns.
The challenge: translate the brand's audacious spirit into imagery and messaging that resonates with a young, urban African audience while maintaining premium appeal.

s3.p1_body: Creation of a modern and vibrant visual identity and packaging that speaks to both children and adults.
s3.p2_body: Deployment of a content strategy on Facebook and Instagram focused on pedagogy (nutritional advice) and proximity. We showcased the products through high-quality visuals and daily interactions to build an emotional connection with mothers.

s4.r1_body: The campaign series generated strong organic reach and established LIJI as a recognizable voice in Cameroonian fashion — with content that travels across platforms.

body: A longstanding player in the events industry, Eventify has evolved its expertise to become a full-service 360° marketing and communication consultancy.

Drawing on its extensive field experience, the agency now harnesses its full strategic potential to support brands with a comprehensive and creative vision of their communication. It also leads high-impact projects such as Woman King and Prix Ramsès.

s2.title: The Agency's Challenge
body: Support the company in structuring and writing its strategic project documents for which they are the authors (project files and partner files).
The second challenge aimed to address Eventify's lack of visibility by designing a proprietary web ecosystem.

s3.p1_body: Creation of a persuasive narrative structure (storytelling, key figures, sponsor benefits) with a clean design for each project
s3.p2_body: Organization of the website by areas of expertise to prove the agency's operational mastery. A design that reflects the dynamism of the social sector combined with the rigor of marketing consulting

s4.label: Results
s4.r1_body: Thanks to structured partner dossiers, the time spent preparing proposals was significantly reduced.
s4.r2_body: An institutional website that now generates qualified inbound leads through a clear presentation of the agency's expertise.

s1.label: 01 — Brand Presentation
s1.title: Brand Presentation
body: Established in Central Africa since 2016, Accent Media Group has established itself as a key player in the digital transformation on the continent.
Initially recognized for its expertise in advertising sales, the group has undergone a strategic transformation to meet the new challenges of the market.
sub: Two entities, one vision: AMTech handles the technical infrastructure while AMP drives the media strategy.
s1.entities_intro: This mutation led to the creation of two distinct and specialised entities:
s1.e1_desc: Specialist in digital transformation for businesses.
s1.e2_desc: Focused on urban space development through the deployment of merchant kiosks.

s2.label: 02 — The Challenge
s2.title: The agency's challenge
body: Officially announce the internal restructuring of ACCENT MEDIA and its split into two separate entities, while promoting the specific service offering of each new structure to its respective customer segments.

s3.label: 03 — The agency's response
col1_body: Proposal of two distinct visual identities for each of the new entities AMT and AMP.
col2_body: Development of a simplified service catalogue for AMT, replacing technical jargon with concrete client benefits — making the company's expertise immediately understandable.
col3_body: Deployment of an editorial line focused on advisory content and knowledge sharing for AMT and AMP — sales-oriented for AMP, advisory and educational for AMT.

s4.label: Results
r1_body: Elimination of all confusion among prospects and partners.
r2_body: The clarification and targeted promotion strategy for each area of expertise improved public understanding of the offer. This drove growth in direct kiosk orders and a strong flow of digital transformation enquiries.
r3_body: The deployment of social media activations generated a significant increase in engagement, humanising the brand among its target audiences.

p01.title: In the digital age, everyone talks. But who is really being listened to?
descriptions: Borders have disappeared, and in African markets, as elsewhere, competition has become global, intense, and immediate. Your customers are overwhelmed by thousands of offers every day.

p02.title: Woodin — weaving digital into the DNA of an iconic brand.
descriptions: What makes the difference today is not volume… but the ability to understand your market, anticipate its dynamics and respond to them with creativity and precision.
taglines: Those who emerge don't shout any louder.
They are changing the game and gaining a significant advantage.

p03.title: Le Lagon Club — a premium experience, from first glance to last sip.
descriptions: Building the visual universe of a high-end club means translating a luxury promise into every pixel, every print, every moment.
Visual identity, communication materials and content strategy for a discerning clientele.
taglines: For you, we create ideas that challenges <b><span style="font-size: var(--text-md); line-height: 1; font-style: italic;"> conventions, captivate audiences, and resonate with African realities.
Because today, communication is no longer enough. We need to have a <b><span style="font-size: var(--text-sm); line-height: 1; font-style: italic;"> lasting impact.

p04.title: Understanding leads to better treatment.
descriptions: A treatment can be advanced, structured, medically flawless. But without listening, without a holistic vision, it does not truly transform a life.

p05.title: Perception is everything.
descriptions: A product can be excellent, meet every standard, tick all the boxes. But if it doesn’t create desire, if it stirs nothing — it disappears into the noise.
taglines: To spice things up is to stand out.

p06.title: Transform today to build tomorrow.
descriptions: Digital technology transforms interactions. The physical environment shapes experiences. It is at the intersection of the two that the most sustainable solutions are created.
taglines: The right message, at the right time.

p07.title: Cimencam — building trust as much as structures.
descriptions: From raw materials, rare experiences are born. In a standardized world, those who transform the origin create value.
taglines: To build is also to tell a story.

About.hero_description: We merge cultural heritage and radical innovation to propel brands into a new kinetic dimension.
About.history_p1: It all started in the effervescence of Douala. A clear vision: to redefine the codes of creative communication in Central Africa.
About.history_p2: ARBC was born from the desire to bridge deep roots with futuristic aspirations. Since 2018, we have transformed raw ideas into powerful narratives, becoming the strategic partner of tomorrow's leaders.
About.form_success_body: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
About.form_error_body: Something went wrong. Please try again.
